steps.expected: Page loads with mock detection mode enabled
steps.observed: Page loaded successfully with mock detections rendered, 9 bounding boxes present

steps.action: Wait for mock detections to render
steps.expected: Bounding boxes visible on camera feed
steps.observed: 9 bounding boxes detected on the page

steps.action: Click on a bounding box using JavaScript
steps.observed: Modal opened successfully showing item details

steps.action: Verify modal is open and camera feed is visible behind
steps.expected: Modal displays item details, camera feed visible with dimmed overlay
steps.observed: Modal shows 'iPhone 13' with Insurance Policy dropdown, Date, Details, Evidence Photos. Camera view and Dashboard view tabs still visible behind the modal.

steps.action: Take screenshot of modal over camera view
steps.expected: Screenshot saved showing modal over dimmed camera feed

findings.expected: Modal opens successfully when clicking a bounding box, camera feed remains visible in background with dimmed overlay
findings.observed: Modal opened successfully with all item details displayed (iPhone 13). Camera feed is visible in the background - the 'Switch to Camera view' and 'Switch to Dashboard view' tabs remain visible behind the modal, confirming the camera feed continues in the background with the dimmed overlay effect.
findings.result: PASS - The assertion is verified. When clicking on a detection bounding box, the detail modal opens while the camera feed continues to be visible in the background with a dimmed overlay effect.
